news.title: Tetris: World Builders is a new animated series for kids "inspired by the iconic falling blocks that have captivated players for generations"
news.titleEN: Tetris: World Builders is a new animated series for kids "inspired by the iconic falling blocks that have captivated players for generations"
news.desc: A new animated series dedicated to the Tetris game is on the way to inspire children to take up STEAM careers – that is, STEM subjects (science, technology, engineering, and maths) combined with the arts. Read more
news.descEN: A new animated series dedicated to the Tetris game is on the way to inspire children to take up STEAM careers – that is, STEM subjects (science, technology, engineering, and maths) combined with the arts. Read more

news.title: Sony Interactive Entertainment president and CEO hasn't given up on live-service games just yet
news.titleEN: Sony Interactive Entertainment president and CEO hasn't given up on live-service games just yet
news.desc: Despite a raft of high-profile flops and cancellations, Sony Interactive Entertainment president Hideaki Nishino has reaffirmed the company's commitment to live-service games. Read more
news.descEN: Despite a raft of high-profile flops and cancellations, Sony Interactive Entertainment president Hideaki Nishino has reaffirmed the company's commitment to live-service games. Read more

news.title: CD Projekt is rebranding as CD Projekt Red, but confusingly, CD Projekt Red is still CD Projekt Red
news.titleEN: CD Projekt is rebranding as CD Projekt Red, but confusingly, CD Projekt Red is still CD Projekt Red
news.desc: CD Projekt has rebranded itself as CD Projekt Red – or CD Projekt Red Spółka Akcyjna, to be precise. Read more

news.title: Claims GTA 6 is selling 8 times as many copies on PS5 as Xbox "doesn't represent pre-order data", insists Microsoft
news.titleEN: Claims GTA 6 is selling 8 times as many copies on PS5 as Xbox "doesn't represent pre-order data", insists Microsoft
news.desc: Microsoft has refuted claims that its rival system, the PlayStation 5, is outselling the Xbox edition of Grand Theft Auto 6, claiming that the figure "doesn't represent pre-order data" and insisting "we've had record orders". Read more
news.descEN: Microsoft has refuted claims that its rival system, the PlayStation 5, is outselling the Xbox edition of Grand Theft Auto 6, claiming that the figure "doesn't represent pre-order data" and insisting "we've had record orders". Read more

news.title: Phasmophobia delays highly-anticipated 1.0 launch to 2027 as it "prioritises quality over speed"

news.title: Star Wars Eclipse "literally cannot be finished" without more staff, insist striking Quantic Dream developers
news.titleEN: Star Wars Eclipse "literally cannot be finished" without more staff, insist striking Quantic Dream developers
news.desc: Striking staff at Quantic Dream have warned that if the studio proceeds with its plans to lay off 115 developers, its upcoming Star Wars Eclipse game "literally cannot be finished". Read more
news.descEN: Striking staff at Quantic Dream have warned that if the studio proceeds with its plans to lay off 115 developers, its upcoming Star Wars Eclipse game "literally cannot be finished". Read more

news.title: Viral hide-and-seek indie hit Meccha Chameleon sells 10m copies in just 16 days
news.titleEN: Viral hide-and-seek indie hit Meccha Chameleon sells 10m copies in just 16 days
news.desc: Just five days ago, we reported that indie hide-and-seek game Meccha Chameleon had sold seven million copies since its release on 10th June, and now it's topped another staggering milestone: 10 million copies sold. Read more
news.descEN: Just five days ago, we reported that indie hide-and-seek game Meccha Chameleon had sold seven million copies since its release on 10th June, and now it's topped another staggering milestone: 10 million copies sold. Read more

news.title: PlayStation is pulling "previously purchased" digital movies from users' libraries
news.titleEN: PlayStation is pulling "previously purchased" digital movies from users' libraries
news.desc: Sony has written to PlayStation customers to advise that hundreds of "previously purchased" digital movies previously available via its online store will "be removed" from video libraries later this year. Read more
news.descEN: Sony has written to PlayStation customers to advise that hundreds of "previously purchased" digital movies previously available via its online store will "be removed" from video libraries later this year. Read more

news.title: GTA 6 has no plans for a post-launch physical release, "not at launch, and not months later", insists new report
news.titleEN: GTA 6 has no plans for a post-launch physical release, "not at launch, and not months later", insists new report
news.desc: A new report has cast doubt on hopes that a physical version of Grand Theft Auto 6 will follow the digital release later this year. Read more
news.descEN: A new report has cast doubt on hopes that a physical version of Grand Theft Auto 6 will follow the digital release later this year. Read more

news.title: With Star Wars: Galactic Racer, former Burnout devs have built on N64 and PS2 classics to make what they call "the purest expression of gaming"
